eas_text: A civil authority has issued A REQUIRED WEEKLY TEST for the following counties or areas: Bexar; Brewster; Hidalgo; Harris; El Paso; Tarrant; Travis; Val Verde; Webb, TX; at 11:57 PM on MAR 4, 2019 Effective until 12:12 AM MAR 5, 2019. Message from DPSAUS.
extra_text: THIS IS A TEST OF THE EMERGENCY ALERT SYSTEM. IF THIS HAD BEEN AN ACTUAL EMERGENCY, YOU WOULD HAVE BEEN GIVEN ADDITIONAL INSTRUCTIONS. THIS IS A TEST. No action necessary.
